title: anisophyllum multiforme
intro: Anisophyllum multiforme, also known as Anisomeles malabarica, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Anisophyllum multiforme include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
